diagrams.title: Python Program Execution Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how Python code flows from source file to output
diagrams.purpose: Understand how Python interprets and executes code step by step

diagrams.title: Variable Assignment in Memory
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how variables are stored in Python memory
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how Python creates objects and references them with variable names

diagrams.title: Operator Precedence Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows order of operations from highest to lowest precedence
diagrams.purpose: Help students remember correct order of evaluating expressions
